title: More Matter Alchemy
description:
[ADDON] More Matter Alchemy

is an addon mod that introduces six new types of matter items and blocks to Item Alchemy
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/222f413cf4021198a020cea30c14f0c8f840aec2.png)

This mod is made for people who want a challenge or desire extremely compact EMC items :3\
💗 It can be used in EMC-based modpacks too. I made this mod because it reminds me of a mod from [Equivalent Skies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/equivalent-skies) ![(discord.momento.lgbt)](https://cdn.discordapp.com/emojis/1152965389119139980.webp?size=24&quality=lossless)

**Items:**

❗ EMC is calculated by (last matter tier * 8) + Aeternalis Fuel EMC (8192)\
🏖️ Example: Yellow matter `3743744 × 8 + 8192 = 29958144 EMC`

| Item | Emc |
|------|-----|
| Orange Matter | 3743744 EMC |
| Yellow Matter | 29958144 EMC |
| Green Matter  | 239673344 EMC |
| Blue Matter   | 1917394944 EMC |
| Purple Matter | 15339167744 EMC |
| White Matter  | 122713350144 EMC |

**Blocks:**

| Block | Emc |
|-------|-----|
| Orange Matter Block | 14974976 EMC |
| Yellow Matter Block | 119832576 EMC |
| Green Matter Block  | 958693376 EMC |
| Blue Matter Block   | 7669579776 EMC |
| Purple Mater Block  | 61356670976 EMC |
| White Matter Block  | 490853400576 EMC |
